svg.text: JOYSTICK → MAX7219 LED MATRIX → I2C LCD → ARDUINO UNO
B R A I L L E _ W R I T E R
③ LiquidCrystal_I2C by Frank de Brabander
Try GENERIC_HW if display is flipped
① Tilt joystick to move cursor (blinking LED)
② SHORT press = toggle dot ON / OFF
③ LONG press (>1s) = confirm letter → LCD
Braille zone = top-left 2×3 area of matrix
Amber border always lit = easy to find
Cursor resets to dot-1 after each letter
github.com — Braille Writer Project — Arduino Uno R3 | MAX7219 FC16 | I2C LCD 16×2
